tasks.title: NotificationStore + toast
tasks.summary: Implement NotificationStore, in-app ring projection, and toast integration.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify toast failures degrade without breaking in-app notifications

tasks.title: Settings persistence and migration
tasks.summary: Implement settings source of truth, atomic write, and migration behavior.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify backup-on-migration and explicit failure surfacing

tasks.title: Shortcut routing engine
tasks.summary: Implement shortcut scopes, validation, and routing behavior.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify conflicts are rejected and scope rules are enforced

tasks.title: Shell integration scripts
tasks.summary: Implement PowerShell/CMD/WSL shell integration scripts and direct-pipe metadata reporting.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify no prompt blocking and schema-aligned direct-pipe payloads

tasks.title: Notifications page + titlebar notifications popover
tasks.summary: Implement the WinUI notifications page and the titlebar-anchored notifications popover as NotificationStore projections.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify the page lists notifications newest-first and refreshes on store changes (07 §10.3)
manual: verify clicking an item marks it read and jumps to its workspace/surface; clear removes it and recomputes unread (07 §10.3)
manual: verify the titlebar notifications button/show_notifications shortcut opens a flyout anchored to the button (07 §11.4)
manual: verify the popover header unread count matches the store and dismiss restores focus to the previous surface (07 §11.4)

tasks.title: Settings window + preferences UI
tasks.summary: Implement the settings window IA (category navigation) and save flow over the settings store.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify the settings window opens single-instance and re-focuses on re-request (17 §8.7, delegating to 02 §7)
manual: verify edited values in each category persist via the atomic write path (17 §8.7)
manual: verify shortcut conflicts are blocked before save with an inline validation error (17 §8.7)
manual: verify fields absent from the v1 schema are not exposed in the UI (17 §8.7)

tasks.title: Terminal clipboard integration + file-URL shell escaping
tasks.summary: Implement terminal copy/paste over Windows Clipboard (bracketed paste, paste confirm) and per-shell file-URL/path escaping.
acceptance_auto: tc-clipboard-copy: selection copy writes CF_UNICODETEXT and the same text reads back from the Windows Clipboard (03 §14.5)
tc-clipboard-bracketed-paste: with bracketed paste mode on, paste is wrapped in ESC[200~/ESC[201~ to stdin (03 §14.5)
tc-clipboard-paste-confirm: newline + bracketed-paste-off shows a confirm dialog, skipped when terminal.paste_confirm=false (03 §14.5)
tc-clipboard-escape-strip: an embedded ESC[201~ is stripped from paste data (03 §14.5)
tc-fileurl-escape-pwsh: a space/quote path pasted to PowerShell becomes a single quoted token (10 §9.4)
tc-fileurl-escape-wsl: C:\src\x.txt becomes '/mnt/c/src/x.txt' for a WSL shell (10 §9.4)

tasks.title: claude-hook event payload contract freeze
tasks.summary: Author the 5 claude-hook event payload schemas in 08.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify 08 documents payload schema (fields, required, errors) for session-start/session-stop/notification/active/idle
notes: doc/policy-freeze task; auto acceptance is the doc-linter anchor check, completeness is manual

tasks.title: claude-hook implementation
tasks.summary: Implement the claude-hook command, session file with LockFileEx, and set_status/clear_status badges.
acceptance_auto: tc-claude-hook-session: session-start/stop create and remove the session file entry under LockFileEx
tc-claude-hook-status: active/idle map to workspace status badges via set_status

tasks.title: App-backend listening-port detector
tasks.summary: Implement backend listening-port detection feeding sidebar listening_ports.
acceptance_auto: tc-port-detect: detector reports listening ports without shell-side polling
tc-port-sidebar-projection: detected ports populate workspace listening_ports

tasks.title: Terminal file-drop reception
tasks.summary: Implement drag-drop onto the terminal: extract paths, escape (10 §9), paste only.
acceptance_auto: tc-file-drop-paste: dropping a file pastes its escaped path without auto-running
tc-file-drop-multi: multiple files join as space-separated escaped tokens

tasks.title: Milestone AT gate (acceptance_manual drain) — v1 porting completion gate
tasks.summary: Human/AT checkpoint: execute every queued acceptance_manual item in this milestone. Passing this gate is the declared 'Windows porting complete' point (18 §1).
acceptance_manual: manual: verify every acceptance_manual item of this milestone's tasks was executed and its result (pass/fail/skip + 사유) recorded in this task's notes
manual: verify the v1 100% claim per 18 §1 — 46 v1-scope features covered and 18 §7.2 dispositions all closed — before declaring porting complete
notes: commands: [] — human/AT gate task; done 전환은 사람 검증으로만 수행한다 (plans/README.md 'AT gate 규칙'). 자율 루프는 이 task를 집지 않는다.
M6 AT gate 통과 = 'Windows 포팅 완료' 선언 시점 (2026-07-04 grill-me 확정, 18 §1). M7은 별도 배포 게이트.
